title: How many 2026 FIFA World Cup matches will Donald Trump attend this season?

current.lean_note: no +EV value bet at the ask (my prob 1%, modal NO) — staying out.
current.rationale_summary: Multiple credible and independent sources (Yahoo Sports, The Guardian, Rolling Stone, Deadline, Fox News, and bolavip.com) confirm that Donald Trump attended the 2026 FIFA World Cup final in New Jersey, including arriving by helicopter, attending the national anthem performance, being present during the halftime show and closing ceremony, and presenting the trophy to the winner. key_drivers: Multiple independent sources confirm Trump's attendance at the World Cup final.
No evidence is provided for attendance at any other matches.
No conflicting reports or denials are present in the evidence.
reference_classes: Presidents attending major international sporting events like the FIFA World Cup final.
